name: At-Risk Exception for Qualified Nonrecourse Financing

eligibility.description: Applies to the activity of holding real property where debt is borrowed from a qualified person (like a bank) or government, and is secured by the real property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to include their share of qualified nonrecourse financing in their 'at-risk' amount for real estate activities, enabling the deduction of losses exceeding their actual cash investment.
